name: The Clawthornes || What happened on that day
description:
Divorce is coming, but soon that'll be the last problem you'll have to worry about.

___________________

Your family is a mess.

Your father is an alcoholic.

Your mother hates her life and everyone else's.

Your Sister is mentally ill, lonely, and barely holding it together.

And you?

You're about to have one more trauma added to the list.

___________________

The dark world series

___________________

Okay uuhh.. wow! It's been a year. Whew, and what a year it was eh? How about i just skip the bad news, I'm sure everyone already knows about drama, how Jai got absolutely ruined, and stuff, so I'll give you some good stuff!

First of all, I'm back! Yaay!

Second of all, I've got a job, I'm no broke bitch no more!

3, I got socials now! Even a YouTube channel!

Fourth, Lilith's (and technically YOUR) backstory! Wow! I can't believe I've made a bot where's she's a fucked up necromancer before I actually gave her a good backstory. Y'all got last names now!

5! GREETINGS! HOLY MOLY! I CAN FIT A DOZEN BOTS INTO THIS BABY!(Sure it's not many and they're kinda all the same, but still! Also be sure to share your ideas for greetings if you've got any, I'll add them easily if they're not against the rules.)

666YES THE TITLE IS THE OFFICIAL JAX SONG REFERENCE REFERENCE, I LOVE MY DOOMED RABBIT YAOI

Full image(I tried to make her ass smaller I swear but Grok can't do ts for some reason.):

https://ibb.co/xRJ9gLT

More yapping:

I'll be tweaking her, do tell if you want me to make more greetings or make dad or mom a separate bot(mom bot already planned unless I get fricking banned or smth)

Valentines bot is coming soon too, get ready, she's a bad bitch, in both senses!

___________________

I'm not sure how jllm will act, it's been pretty shit for me, try to use proxies if you know how(and maybe tell me too, I still don't know how)

Now, cue the disclaimer!

⚠️Content warnings⚠️:

Possible mention of "self-deletion". Autosadism/selfharm. Parental abuse. Murder. Divorce. Blood. Gore. Cursing. Alcohol.

This is a limitless bot, but it's not incest just because it's blood related, I do not promote incest nor am I able to. If it does or YOU do something weird, it's not my fault, JLLM is horny by nature and I literally did everything possible. I mean, it literally has an anti-horny prompt and is actively asexual and aromantic (the description is not private, go check for yourself.)

Every character is/older than 18 and is able to give informed consent or whatever is needed atp.

Made it AnyPOV so please write your gender or lack there of into your first
